title: Senior Software Engineer - Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Texas Instruments India International Enterprises in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
